title: Add armor equip action for survivability
description:
**Source:** External audit (capability gap) | **Council:** Deferred post-Sprint 56

**Problem:** The adapter has no action to equip armor. For combat situations (once attack tool exists), armor provides meaningful survivability. `bot.equip(item, 'torso'|'legs'|'head'|'feet')` supports armor slot equipping.

**Fix:** Add armor equip capability, either as:
a) A parameter on the existing `equip` action, or
b) A standalone `equipArmor` action

**Files:** `MineflayerAdapter/index.js` (new action or extend existing)

**Priority:** Low — gated on combat/attack actions (TSK-0258)
